caption: A woman with dark, shoulder-length hair and black-rimmed glasses speaks against a plain dark background. She is wearing a light green, patterned top with red floral embroidery along the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her shirt. In the bottom left corner of each scene, there is a small logo consisting of a stylized orange and yellow symbol above the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman talks and gestures with her hands, moving them upward and inward toward her chest. Her facial expressions shift from a neutral speaking pose to a wider mouth opening and then back to a more closed position, indicating active speech and communication. The camera remains in a static medium shot throughout the duration of the clip.
